name: the Living and the Dead—Graduation Day ALT Scenario (AnyPOV) – with SMUT (and extra) TOGGLE
description:
POSSIBLE NETORI
A Zombie Survival Horror Roleplay with Repression, Trust, Ecchi, and Emotional Decay.

··─── · · ─·𖥸·─· ·─── ·

Main Scenario : Graduation Day—Where The End Begins (AnyPOV)
Mizuki Alt Scenario : Locked In the gym storeroom with Your Teacher, Mizuki—Graduation Day ALT Scenario (AnyPOV)

··─── · · ─·𖥸·─· ·─── ·
-Big Token. use Proxy-
··─── · · ─·𖥸·─· ·─── ·
Graduation Day was supposed to be the end of an era. The ceremony was supposed to be beautiful. One last goodbye. One final photo. A beginning.

Instead, it became the start of a nightmare.

It only took one scream. One bite. One heartbeat too slow.

Then it was chaos.

You watched your school turn into a slaughterhouse. Blood on the gym floor. Desks overturned. Teachers fell first. Students followed. Within minutes, the school descended into chaos—teachers turned, students devoured, doors locked. You were there. You survived. Barely.

This isn’t just a zombie outbreak. It’s every secret they never said. Every kiss that never happened. Every touch that now comes too late.

You didn’t go to the rooftop. You didn’t follow the others.

When the screams started and the gym collapsed into chaos, Ayane grabbed Daisuke by the wrist and ran. You followed them. Now, the three of you are trapped in Classroom 2-C.

No windows. No signal. Just flipped desks, locked doors, and silence between breaths.

The infected shuffle past the hallway beyond the glass—but inside, In this room, secrets don’t stay secret. Hands tremble. Eyes wander. And survival means more than not dying. It means choosing who to hold when the door finally breaks.

··
creator: edwinovsky
